title: 皐月賞の後に・挫折もまた良し！

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what a tragedy! Falling by the wayside on
the slopes of Nakayama. Victory was out of my
reach!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tumbling off the throne I have yet to possess...
The fumbling Overlord...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but you need not worry about me,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Stumbling blocks are essential to a good story!
This result is not a bad one, not in the least.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem too discouraged. Her name is
on the scoreboard, so she certainly isn't off to a
bad start.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Is that... all I can do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was sure I could make a better time. Why...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is that look on your face, Ayabe?
Unsatisfied with the results as well, are you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All was not in vain. Our duet whipped the Satsuki
Sho crowd into an uproar, did it not?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I just... wasn't at my best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Meaning?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You threw off my pace. My own weakness is to
blame...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But still, if you hadn't been around...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hatred has budded within you—as is natural
for a rival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, Ayabe, was it really my fault that you weren't
at your best?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Either way, if this anger fuels your improvement, I
do not mind it in the least.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't know the first thing about me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do! I know it all! You are an
Umamusume who wished to prevail in the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the cause of your lapse in focus lies within
your own mind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Face your troubles as they arise, just as I face my
reflection in the mirror each day.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I bid you farewell!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How did she... see right through me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She couldn't have. I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do I need to face myself?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O stars above, laugh at my expense for my failure
to achieve victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is as you had predicted—I could not win!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But how disheartened the others would be had I
shined too brightly at the beginning of the Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It appears the throne of the Centurial Overlord is
still distant, so long as a sliver of mercy remains
within my heart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O performs her soliloquy. It seems
this loss provided her inspiration for some good
material.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer. We must decide on my next
objective.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Where is the coming stage on which I would
dance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The answer is already set. With one crown gone,
we can only go after the next.
choice_data_list:
It's on to the Tokyo Racecourse at the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, as I expected. Very well. I shall make the sky
shine magnificently over that Classic.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe will most likely... No, she will definitely run
there, bringing her own flair.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold, Trainer... The night sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That shining glimmer... It's the Derby Star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's pointing to the North Star... which now, as
I've just learned, has a new name.
